metadata.description: Personal Claude Code skills and plugins

plugins.name: quorum
plugins.description: Debate a design question with N agents arguing different positions, then synthesize a recommendation.

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Parallel code review with 4 specialized agents: Uncle Bob (SOLID/TDD), Dan North (CUPID), Test Architect (pyramid/quality), and Security (PII/secrets). Includes bundled coding standards and testing philosophy docs.
